summary_en: ¥12.0B buyback authorization, 4,000,000 shares (7.4% of outstanding), open-market purchase from May 18, 2026 to March 31, 2027. All acquired shares to be cancelled June 30, 2027. Rationale: 100%+ total payout ratio target for FY3/27.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Cancellation of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: GLORY Ltd. announced on May 15, 2026 that its Board of Directors has resolved to acquire up to 4,000,000 shares of common stock (7.4% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate amount of ¥12.0 billion via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The acquisition period runs from May 18, 2026 to March 31, 2027. All acquired shares will be cancelled on June 30, 2027. The company states the rationale is to achieve its stated policy target of 100% or greater total payout ratio for the fiscal year ending March 2027. As of May 13, 2026, the company held 5,181,517 treasury shares against 53,756,693 shares outstanding (excluding treasury).
